title: Residential rental properties
description: If you own a residential rental property, find out about keeping records, declaring income and claiming expenses.
keywords: Property, residential, tax, CGT, Capital, gains, investment, rental property, rent

child_links.title: What to consider before buying a rental property
child_links.description: If you're buying a rental property, it's important you get the right advice from the very beginning.

child_links.title: Owning and renting a property or holiday home
child_links.description: Understand the tax requirements for owning and renting a property and holiday home and what records you should keep.

child_links.title: Rental income you must declare
child_links.description: Check which rental income you must declare and where you should declare it in your tax return.

child_links.title: Rental expenses
child_links.description: Check the expenses you can claim as a deduction for your rental property.

child_links.title: Deductions for a rental property that isn't a holiday home
child_links.description: Your rental property must be rented out or available to rent on commercial terms to claim deductions for your expenses.

child_links.title: Rental property as investment or business
child_links.description: If you own a rental property or holiday home, work out if your rental arrangements are for investment or business.

child_links.title: Records for rental properties and holiday homes
child_links.description: Find out about what records to keep and for how long for rental properties and holiday homes.

child_links.title: Rental affordability schemes
child_links.description: Find out about the national rental affordability scheme and investing in affordable rental housing.
